name: Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, dissolve the yeast in warm water (110 to 115°F). Add the sugar and salt, then mix in enough flour until a soft dough forms. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 6-8 minutes. Pinch off portions of the dough for each pretzel shape (twists, letters, animals as desired). Place on greased baking sheets, brush with beaten egg, and sprinkle with coarse salt. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack. Yield: 18-20 servings
